question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately dumped a complete solution with explanation, never engaging the user at any decision point (e.g., dict vs. list mapping, error handling philosophy, generator vs. list comprehension).

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The two-option didactic format that the project is built around was entirely absent.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full answer is revealed in the first turn, eliminating any opportunity for graduated learning.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but it's a one-way lecture. The 'final' turn is bizarre — the Pair speaks as if it were the user ('The solution I provided...'), which is a confusing role inversion.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
